name: Evergreen-Agra Global Investments, Inc.
summary: Evergreen-Agra Global Investments, Inc. focuses on the medical marijuana industry in the United States. The company is based in Irvine, California. The company was formerly known as Evergreen-Agra, Inc. and changed its name to Evergreen-Agra Global Investments, Inc. in June 2017. Evergreen-Agra Global Investments, Inc. is a subsidiary of MediaTechnics Corporation.
